simple_types.name: CKGR_MOR_KEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type CKGR_MOR_KEY_Field is
   CKGR_MOR_KEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 8;

enumeration_literals.name: CKGR_MOR_KEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation.Always
reads as 0.

simple_types.name: CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_Field
simple_types.code:
type CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_Field is
   Val_4_MHz,
   Val_8_MHz,
   Val_12_MHz)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: Val_4_MHz
enumeration_literals.description: The Fast RC Oscillator Frequency is at 8 MHz

enumeration_literals.name: Val_8_MHz
enumeration_literals.description: The Fast RC Oscillator Frequency is at 12 MHz

   MAIN_CLK,
   PLLA_CLK,
   UPLL_CLK)
  with Size => 2;

   CLK_2,
   CLK_4,
   CLK_8,
   CLK_16,
   CLK_32,
   CLK_64,
   CLK_3)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: PMC_PCR_DIV_Field

  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit. Always reads as 0.
